subcodes.first_line: We make mention of the servants through the Most Great Remembrance, which God hath made to be the source of the remembrance of all the worlds. Verily, He is the One Who [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نذکر العباد بالذکر الاعظم الذی جعله الله مبدء ذکر العالمین انه لهو الذی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
